resources.string: Group video call in progress. Tap to join.
Send a message to start the conversation.
Fill in information to get started
Enter a keyword to find results
Try a different keyword or filter
Start a chat or create a group to see it here.
Create a group to collaborate with others.
Your call history will appear here.
Be the first to share something.
Sign in to continue your conversations
Set up your profile and join the chat
This deletes the message and attachments for all participants.
Sign in to view this post
Swipe to answer or decline call
You have not blocked anyone yet.
You do not have any pending friend requests.
Settings reset to default. Please restart the app to apply.
Server settings saved. Please restart the app to apply.
Are you sure you want to log out?
This will permanently delete your account. You will receive an OTP via email to confirm.
Reset all settings to default? This clears your custom server configuration.

For help and support, contact:

Email: support@chatapp.com
Phone: +1 (555) 123-4567
When enabled, anyone can find and join this group. When disabled, only invited members can join.
Select at least 2 friends to create a group
Cannot reach %1$s. Use the same Wi‑Fi as your PC, then tap the server address below to verify IP/port.
You have not reacted to this message
Could not process add member response
Server does not support cancel request yet
Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your email.
This is a reply to the comment.
Permissions are required for video call
Video call feature is not available
Camera permission required to take photos
Storage permission required to select images
Microphone permission required to record voice messages
File size too large. Maximum 50MB allowed.
Failed to receive image URL from server
Unable to access selected file. Please try again.
Failed to receive file URL from server
You blocked this user. Unblock to continue.
No connection. Message will be sent when network is available.
Error preparing message. Will retry later.
No app found to open this file
Friend added but failed to create chat
Unable to start call: chat not loaded
Cannot share: Post data is invalid
Unable to get other user info
Avatar selected. Click save to upload.
Please enter a valid phone number
Avatar will be removed when you save
Report must be at most 100 words
Password reset successful. Please log in.
Only group creator and admins can change privacy settings
Post link copied. Open in app to view.
Failed to send. Tap to retry.
Only group creator and admins can change privacy settings.
Enter your email to receive a reset code.
Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
Maximum %1$d images allowed. Remove some first.
Cannot share: post data is invalid
Group avatar – all members can change
